relationship: ずっと無理していた友達同士
setting: 夜、ずっと無理していた友達が初めて本音を話す
lyrics:
[Intro]
Patience, all of this will make sense
Oh, I gotta say less
I know full well, I'll never tell
How I've been feeling alone

[Chorus]
Oh, I need you like water my love
Some things never change
Maybe I'm thinking out loud?
Need a reason or sign from above
My love, my love

[Verse 1]
Distance
Nothing learned is painless
Missing all of my friends
They'll never know
I'm losing control now

[Chorus]
I'm really feeling it now
Oh I need you like water my love
Some things never change
I'm barely breathing right now
Need a reason or a sign from above
My love, my love

lyricsJa.en: Patience, all of this will make sense
lyricsJa.ja: 辛抱していれば、いつか全部わかるはず
ああ、あまり言わないでおかないと

lyricsJa.en: I know full well, I'll never tell
lyricsJa.ja: よくわかってる、僕はきっと打ち明けない
どれだけ孤独を感じてきたかなんて

lyricsJa.en: Oh, I need you like water my love
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、君が必要なんだ、水みたいに、愛しい人
変わらないものもある
もしかして、声に出して考えてるだけかな？

lyricsJa.en: Need a reason or sign from above
lyricsJa.ja: 理由か、天からのしるしが欲しい
愛しい人、愛しい人
距離
痛みなしに学べることなんてない
友達みんなが恋しい
彼らはきっと知らない
今、僕が自分を保てなくなってることなんて
今、本当にそれを感じてる

lyricsJa.en: Oh I need you like water my love
lyricsJa.ja: ああ、君が必要なんだ、水みたいに、愛しい人
変わらないものもある
今は息をするのもやっとだ

lyricsJa.en: Need a reason or a sign from above
lyricsJa.ja: 理由か、天からのしるしが欲しい
愛しい人、愛しい人

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Just wait a little longer, and everything will settle down.
sentences.displayHtml: Just wait a little longer, and everything will settle down.

conversation.japanese: ずっと自分に「辛抱しろ」って言い聞かせてる。もう少し待てば全部落ち着くって。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Do you really believe all of this is going to make sense someday?
sentences.displayHtml: Do you really believe all of this is going to make sense someday?

conversation.japanese: 本当に、これ全部いつか意味がわかるようになるって思ってるの？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: But honestly, I gotta say less, because if I start talking, I might fall apart.
sentences.displayHtml: But honestly, I gotta say less, because if I start talking, I might fall apart.

conversation.japanese: そう思いたい。でも正直、あまり話さないようにしてる。話し始めたら崩れそうだから。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Noah, I know full well you're not okay.
sentences.displayHtml: Noah, I know full well you're not okay.

sentences.text: You don't have to hide it from me.
sentences.displayHtml: You don't have to hide it from me.

conversation.japanese: Noah、君が大丈夫じゃないことくらい、私はちゃんとわかってるよ。私には隠さなくていい。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I don't even know how I've been feeling lately.
sentences.displayHtml: I don't even know how I've been feeling lately.

sentences.text: It's like I'm watching myself from far away.
sentences.displayHtml: It's like I'm watching myself from far away.

conversation.japanese: 最近、自分がどう感じているのかもわからないんだ。遠くから自分を見てるみたいで。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Maybe this is just you thinking out loud right now, and that's okay.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe this is just you thinking out loud right now, and that's okay.

conversation.japanese: 今はただ、君が考えていることをそのまま口に出してるだけなのかも。それでいいよ。完璧な言葉なんていらない。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I kept waiting for some sign from above, like something would tell me what to do.
sentences.displayHtml: I kept waiting for some sign from above, like something would tell me what to do.

conversation.japanese: ずっと天からのしるしみたいなものを待ってた。何かがどうすればいいか教えてくれる気がして。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I wish it worked that way, but Nothing learned is painless.
sentences.displayHtml: I wish it worked that way, but Nothing learned is painless.

conversation.japanese: そうだったらいいけど、痛みなしに学べることなんてないんだよ。学びって、先に傷つくこともある。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I'm scared because I'm losing control.
sentences.displayHtml: I'm scared because I'm losing control.

sentences.text: I feel like I'm barely breathing.
sentences.displayHtml: I feel like I'm barely breathing.

conversation.japanese: 怖いんだ。自分を保てなくなってるし、息をするのもやっとな気がする。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Then lean on me for a minute.
sentences.displayHtml: Then lean on me for a minute.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ少し私に頼って。まず一回の呼吸から始めよう。

thumbnailSource: Luke Chiang - Never Tell Official Music Video
